tool.name: create_agent
tool.description: Create and spawn a new agent to handle a specific subtask. The new agent runs on a separate daemon thread and inherits parent context by default.

parameter.name: task
parameter.description: The specific task/objective for the new agent

parameter.name: inherit_context
parameter.description: Whether to inherit parent's conversation history (default: true)

tool.name: send_message_to_agent
tool.description: Send a message to another agent for coordination.

tool.name: wait_for_message
tool.description: Pause the agent loop until receiving a message from another agent. IMPORTANT: Only use when sub-agents are actively running.

parameter.name: reason
parameter.description: Explanation for why the agent is waiting

tool.name: agent_finish
tool.description: Mark a subagent's task as completed and report results to parent agent. Can ONLY be used by subagents (agents with a parent).

parameter.name: findings
parameter.description: List of specific findings or discoveries

parameter.name: success
parameter.description: Whether the task completed successfully (default: true)

parameter.name: report_to_parent
parameter.description: Whether to send results back to parent (default: true)

tool.name: view_agent_graph
tool.description: View the current agent graph showing all agents, their relationships, and status.
